claim: Crestview municipality awarded a $7.1M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road resurfacing, completing work by Q4 2024.

corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — Crestview
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of Crestview data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — Crestview
Date: 2024-03-22

This record confirms Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road resurfacing, completing work by Q4 2024. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.

corpus.title: Post: Pacific Minerals Corp Quarterly Update
corpus.snippet: The National Research Foundation released its annual report covering activities ...
corpus.content: The National Research Foundation released its annual report covering activities across digital infrastructure. Key highlights include expanded partnerships and a 3.8% increase in participation. The report is available on their website.

corpus.title: News: Crestview — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road res...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Crestview makes a significant move amid changes in the municipal sector

Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road resurfacing, completing work by Q4 2024. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in municipal strategy. A spokesperson for Crestview declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.title: Report: Pinnacle Industries Quarterly Update
corpus.snippet: Pinnacle Industries reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations...
corpus.content: Pinnacle Industries reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $311M was up 10.6% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

corpus.content: NovaTech Systems reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $70M was up 6.0% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

corpus.title: Crestview Procurement Notice — Contract Award 2024-INF-009
corpus.snippet: Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road resurfacing, completing...
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL CONTRACT AWARD NOTICE
Contract ID: 2024-INF-009 | Awarded: March 22, 2024

Scope: Arterial road resurfacing — 23.4 lane-miles across 6 corridors
Awardee: Hartwell Construction Group, Inc.
Contract Value: $4,712,400 (fixed price)
Completion Deadline: December 15, 2024

Selection basis: Lowest responsive bid. Three bids received; Hartwell bid $4.71M vs. next-lowest $5.3M.
Approved by: Director of Public Works, March 22, 2024.
